They have taken the people’s game and are making a mockery of it. Are we surprised by the actions of Infantino, the most corrupt president to lead FIFA who awarded a peace prize to the president of the United States and breaks bread with people implicated in the Epstein files. They believe the public won’t do anything about it so they’re seeing how far they can continue their corruption in broad daylight. All FIFA is now is an organization designed to sport
